confidence_note: Confidence levels: HIGH (strong evidence from static reverse engineering), MODERATE (inferred from code structure or partial evidence), LOW (weak/circumstantial evidence). This feed contains ONLY new IOCs not present in the April 6 feed (open-directory-172-105-0-126-20260406-iocs.json). All IOCs derived from static analysis of 106 files recovered from the same open directory.

cryptographic_indicators.rsa_1024_context: RSA-1024 public key shared across CS 4.4 beacons (beacon_full.x64.dll, beacon80.dll) and gen-2 custom beacon (mini_beacon2.exe). Ties custom implant development to CS 4.4 infrastructure.
cryptographic_indicators.aes_iv_context: Hardcoded AES-128-CBC IV — shared across gen-3 and gen-4 OpenStrike beacons. Already in April 6 feed but confirmed in gen-4.
cryptographic_indicators.cs_watermark_context: Second cracked CS distribution watermark — found in beacon80.dll and all 7 artifact-wrapped beacons. Associated with Chinese-language cracked CS packages.
cryptographic_indicators.ssl_cert_context: Team server SSL certificate — searchable in Shodan/Censys for infrastructure pivoting
cryptographic_indicators.jar_authkey_context: RSA-2048 public key fingerprint from CS 4.9.1 JAR authkey.pub — does NOT match the .auth file (keypair mismatch confirms mixed cracked builds)
